profile.role: experiences through minimalist aesthetics and user-centered design.
profile.subtitle: Creating meaningful digital and physical experiences through minimalist aesthetics and user-centered design.
profile.bio:
Founded by Anthony Yau in 2026, AYDesign is a Hong Kong-based brand and design studio specialising in visual identity, UI/UX, and packaging design.

My work focuses on integrating graphic design, high-quality printing, and product development into cohesive, tangible outcomes. I’m especially interested in the human side of design — how materials, textures, and thoughtful information architecture shape our sensory experience.

My projects are research-driven and grounded in design thinking, user experience, and user research. The scope includes brand strategy, visual identity, typography, photography, book design, packaging, printing technologies, product design, signage, websites, and other collateral.

Rather than simply designing, I see my role as helping bring ideas to life — transforming undeveloped concepts into meaningful physical or digital experiences.

Let’s create something not just visible, but tangible.
profile.termsOfUse:
1. Nature of Work (Speculative & Conceptual Design)
All projects showcased on this website, unless explicitly labeled as "Commissioned Work" or "Official Collaboration," are the sole intellectual property of Anthony Yau. These works represent academic research, personal creative explorations, and speculative design concepts intended to demonstrate professional skills in physical production, information design, and brand strategy.


2. Third-Party Trademarks and Intellectual Property
Any reference to existing corporate names, brand identities, or trademarks is for descriptive, analytical, and research purposes only.

a) No Affiliation: There is no official affiliation, sponsorship, endorsement, or partnership between the designer and the brands mentioned.

b) Ownership: All respective trademarks, logos, and brand assets belong to their rightful owners.

c) Purpose: These brands are utilized as a contextual framework to explore structural innovation, material tactile experiences, and visual communication strategies.


3. Intellectual Property Rights (Designer’s Copyright)
The original content presented on this website—including but not limited to physical prototypes, structural packaging designs, custom typography, photography, and design methodologies—is the exclusive property of Anthony Yau.

a) Photography: All product photography and environmental shots of physical prototypes are original works produced by the designer.

b) Prohibition: Unauthorized reproduction, redistribution, or modification of any visual or textual content for commercial gain, AI training, or professional misrepresentation is strictly prohibited without prior written consent.


4. Non-Commercial Intent
The physical prototypes and sub-brand concepts displayed herein are created for portfolio demonstration and professional assessment only. These items are not available for retail sale, mass production, or commercial distribution. Any perceived commercial value is purely hypothetical and part of the conceptual framework of the project.


5. Limitation of Liability
The information provided on this website is for general informational and portfolio purposes. The designer assumes no responsibility or liability for any errors or omissions in the content of this site, nor for any actions taken based on the conceptual ideas presented.
